mapper.sql: select supplier_id, supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, settlement_type, payment_days, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from erp_supplier
mapper.select:
and supplier_code like concat('%', #{supplierCode}, '%') and supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%') and contact_name like concat('%', #{contactName}, '%') and status = #{status}
order by supplier_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into erp_supplier(supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_name, contact_phone, settlement_type, payment_days, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{contactName}, #{contactPhone}, #{settlementType}, #{paymentDays}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete:
delete from erp_supplier where supplier_id in
#{supplierId}
